# controller-full

Controller cmd-params: sharding, logs, processors, caches, metrics, self.heal, sync, extras from HA/metrics docs

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/controller-full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  controller.sharding.algorithm: consistent-hashing
  controller.log.format: json
  controller.log.level: debug
  controller.status.processors: "30"
  controller.operation.processors: "15"
  controller.hydration.processors: "8"
  controller.app.state.cache.expiration: 2h
  controller.default.cache.expiration: 12h
  controller.resource.health.persist: "true"
  controller.kubectl.parallelism.limit: "25"
  controller.diff.server.side: "true"
  controller.ignore.normalizer.jq.timeout: 5s
  controller.metrics.cache.expiration: 24h
  controller.metrics.application.labels: team,env
  controller.metrics.application.conditions: OrphanedResourceWarning,ComparisonError
  controller.metrics.cluster.labels: environment,region
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: "5"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cooldown.seconds: "10"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.timeout.seconds: "2"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.factor: "3"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cap.seconds: "300"
  controller.sync.timeout.seconds: "600"
  controller.sync.wave.delay.seconds: "3"
  hydrator.enabled: "true"
  controller.profile.enabled: "true"
  controller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  controller.repo.error.grace.period.seconds: "180"
  controller.cluster.cache.batch.events.processing: "true"
  controller.cluster.cache.events.processing.interval: 100ms
  controller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  controller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  controller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  controller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  controller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  controller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m
  controller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  controller.k8sclient.retry.max: "3"
  controller.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "100"
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  controller.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller:
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 2h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 12h0m0s
    clusterCache:
      batchEventsProcessing: true
      eventsProcessingInterval: 100ms
    diff:
      ignoreNormalizerJQTimeout: 5s
      serverSide:
        enabled: true
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 500
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 100ms
        max: 3
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 5m0s
        keepAlive: 30s
        timeout: 30s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 10s
    kubectlParallelismLimit: 25
    log:
      format: json
      level: debug
    metrics:
      application:
        conditions:
        - OrphanedResourceWarning
        - ComparisonError
        labelKeys:
        - team
        - env
      cacheExpiration: 24h0m0s
      cluster:
        labelKeys:
        - environment
        - region
    processors:
      hydration: 8
      operation: 15
      status: 30
    profileEnabled: true
    repoErrorGracePeriod: 3m0s
    resourceHealthPersist: true
    selfHeal:
      backoff:
        duration: 2s
        factor: 3
        maxDuration: 5m0s
      cooldown: 10s
      timeout: 5s
    sharding:
      algorithm: consistent-hashing
    sourceHydrator:
      enabled: true
    sync:
      timeout: 10m0s
      wave:
        delay: 3s
  repoServer:
    client:
      insecureSkipVerify: false
      timeout: 1m0s
      tlsEnabled: true
  server: {}
```

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:

  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  controller.app.state.cache.expiration: 2h0m0s
  controller.cluster.cache.batch.events.processing: "true"
  controller.cluster.cache.events.processing.interval: 100ms
  controller.default.cache.expiration: 12h0m0s
  controller.diff.server.side: "true"
  controller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  controller.hydration.processors: "8"
  controller.ignore.normalizer.jq.timeout: 5s
  controller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  controller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  controller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  controller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m0s
  controller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  controller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  controller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  controller.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "100"
  controller.k8sclient.retry.max: "3"
  controller.kubectl.parallelism.limit: "25"
  controller.log.format: json
  controller.log.level: debug
  controller.metrics.application.conditions: OrphanedResourceWarning,ComparisonError
  controller.metrics.application.labels: team,env
  controller.metrics.cache.expiration: 24h0m0s
  controller.metrics.cluster.labels: environment,region
  controller.operation.processors: "15"
  controller.profile.enabled: "true"
  controller.repo.error.grace.period.seconds: "180"
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  controller.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  controller.resource.health.persist: "true"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cap.seconds: "300"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cooldown.seconds: "10"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.factor: "3"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.timeout.seconds: "2"
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: "5"
  controller.sharding.algorithm: consistent-hashing
  controller.status.processors: "30"
  controller.sync.timeout.seconds: "600"
  controller.sync.wave.delay.seconds: "3"
  hydrator.enabled: "true"
  server.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.repo.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.plaintext
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.strict.tls
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
```
